title: Quotinator Changelog (per-language file)
description: Schema for a single per-language changelog file (changelog.en.json, changelog.nl.json, etc.). The generation script (scripts/changelog.csx) produces CHANGELOG.md and addon/CHANGELOG.md from changelog.en.json. Never edit the generated markdown files directly.

language.description: ISO 639-1 code of the language used in this file (e.g. 'en', 'nl', 'de'). Must match the file's content — used to key the file in the service and acts as confirmation that the filename and content agree.

sourceLanguage.description: ISO 639-1 code of the fallback language file. When language == sourceLanguage there is no further fallback (this file is authoritative). The service uses this to walk the fallback chain when the requested language file is absent.

machineTranslated.description: True when the content of this file was machine-generated rather than manually curated. The Blazor UI shows a disclaimer when this is true. Omit or set false for hand-written or source-language files.

sectionHeaders.description: Localised display names for the five changelog sections in the language of this file. Optional — when absent the generator uses built-in English strings.

unreleased.description: Changes not yet in a release, following the Keep a Changelog [Unreleased] convention. Rendered as ## [Unreleased] at the top of keepachangelog format output. Omitted from ha-addon format — HA Store shows only released versions.

releases.description: Ordered list of releases, newest first.

sectionHeadersEntry.description: Display names for all five sections in one language. All keys are optional.

changelogEntry.description: Base content shared by unreleased and release entries.

issues.description: GitHub issue numbers this work addresses. Must be set manually — issue numbers are ambiguous in prose and cannot be auto-detected.

highlights.description: User-facing plain-language summary. Each item is one sentence. No CVE IDs, API paths, class names, or technical terms. Omit or leave empty for internal-only releases.

audienceHighlights.description: Audience-specific highlight overrides keyed by audience identifier (e.g. 'ha-addon'). When a key is present and non-empty, the generator uses those items for that audience instead of the standard highlights. When present but empty ([]), the generator emits 'No user-facing changes.' When the key is absent, the standard highlights are used as fallback.

added.description: Technical description of new features added.

changed.description: Technical description of changes to existing behaviour.

removed.description: Technical description of removed features or behaviour.

release.description: A versioned release. Recommended property order: version, date, issues, cves, highlights, audienceHighlights, added, changed, fixed, removed. JSON Schema cannot enforce ordering; generators must apply it explicitly.

version.description: Semver string, including optional pre-release suffix (e.g. '1.0.0-beta.1').
